text.title: ClickUp Setup Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply ClickUp Setup end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: provision-workspace
step.action: Create Workspace; invite team; pick ≤3 Spaces.

step.name: define-statuses
step.action: Pin canonical 7-state set at Workspace level.

step.name: trim-clickapps
step.action: Disable non-essentials; keep Time Tracking + Custom Fields + Dependencies + Sprints.
